programs.title: 60 Minutes Australia 24/7
programs.desc: (NA) James Kingston scales building, cranes, towers and bridges with nothing to stop him from falling.

programs.title: 60 Minutes Australia 24/7
programs.desc: 60 Minutes Australia provides investigative journalism and in-depth reporting on major national and international issues. It features exclusive interviews, real-life stories, and detailed coverage of current affairs and human interest topics. Through strong storytelling and on-the-ground reporting, it uncovers truths behind significant events and controversies.
